title: bridge-jmap: sinceQueryState computed but never sent
description: bridge-jmap/src/jmap.rs:185-195: `filter` is mutated to include `sinceQueryState` when `since_state` is Some, but `args` at line 195 uses a fresh inline `{"inMailbox": mailbox_id}` object — the `filter` variable is never referenced in `args`. Consequence: incremental polling is completely broken; every poll fetches all emails in the mailbox rather than just changes since last state, defeating the purpose of tracking `query_state`. Fix: replace the inline filter in `args` with the `filter` variable: `"filter": filter`.
